nodes.label: Home screen — Complementos del ritual + Recordatorios sections spacing audit
nodes.description: Home tab showing two lower sections: (1) 'Complementos del ritual' with subtitle 'Pequeñas prácticas que se completan durante el enfoque' and an Editar button. Grid of 8 ritual complement items: Meditar (10 min), Leer (20 min), Estudiar (45 min), Respirar (5 min), Gratitud (5 series), Entrenar (30 min), Journaling (15 min), Visualizar (9 min), Caminar (3 km), Suplementos (Hecho). (2) 'Recordatorios' section with '3 activos' subtitle. Items: Meditar 5 min (07:30, Diario), Hidratarse (cada 90min, Diario), Cierre del dia (21:00, Diario), Llamar a mamá (sin hora). Screenshot context: spacing-03 naming implies this is the third iteration of spacing adjustments for bottom sections. Top shows Facebook notification bar with '+ Agregar apps' option. Mentex Tweaks panel open with same state: Glass card style, Inter typography, Activo estado.

nodes.label: App blocker notification bar — Facebook blocked, Agregar apps CTA
nodes.description: At the top of the Home screen, a notification/status bar shows the app blocker is active. Facebook app icon is shown as blocked with a dismiss X, and a '+ Agregar apps' call-to-action link. This is the in-screen app blocker UI rendered within the Home tab context.
